entities.description: As a subsection of 'Hardware Resources', this section provides an overview of the LED hardware components included on the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board, detailing their functionality and integration within the system.
Refers to the Light Emitting Diode components used as status indicators or functional elements on the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board, as described in section 1.6.

relations.description: The concept of 'LED' is a primary topic of section 1.6.
